title: Muldale Plastic Jug with Glasses Set - Acrylic Drinking Jug and Tumblers Set for Garden - Sangria Pimms Water Pitcher - Boho Style - 2300ml
features: Perfect for Party and Picnic Occasions - Embrace fun-filled gatherings with this Pimms jug and plastic tumblers set, ideal for delightful drinks and cocktails.
A Pimms and Sangria Sensation - Crafted to elevate your picnic experience, this plastic party jug comes complete with four baroque design tumblers. Jug Capacity: 2300ml. Tumblers Capacity: 400ml.
Lid Included for Freshness - Seal in flavors effortlessly with this pitcher jug, ensuring your beverages stay deliciously refreshing.
Easy to Pour Perfection - With its effortless pouring spout, this plastic jug with lid makes every sip smooth and enjoyable for you and your guests.
Suitable for Kids and Adults Alike - Chic design, ideal for indoor and outdoor occasions, with an easy-to-handle jug and tumblers.
description: Product Description What are the sizes of these tumblers? The approximate size of each tumbler is 12.5cm (h) x 8.4cm (diameter) Are these drinking tumblers suitable for kids? Yes they are. With the large capacity jug, the whole set would be great at kids parties. What is the capacity of the pitcher? The jug has a 2300ml capacity. Is this acrylic plastic jug and tumbler set easy to clean? Yes, the whole set is dishwasher and freezer safe.
